turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, mujhe psychiatrist se milna hai. Kya aapke yahan psychiatry department hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan ji, humare yahan mental wellness aur psychiatry OPD hai. Aapka naam?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh... Riya Sharma. Please confidential rakhiyega.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul, Riya ji. Aapki privacy humare liye bahut important hai. Sab kuch confidential hai. Aapka contact number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya. Dr. Meera Goswami psychiatrist hain. Next week Monday ya Tuesday available hain. Kab aana chahogi?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Monday theek hai. Evening ho sakti hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, Monday 5 PM ka slot hai. Book kar doon?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done Riya ji. Monday 5 PM, Dr. Meera Goswami. Aap bilkul comfortable feel karein — aap sahi kadam utha rahi hain.
